content:
Dear @everyone,
Thank you so much from the bottom of our hearts for your help!
We have compiled the translation contributions we've received so far; the translations have been updated in game as of the V2.5.0 update. (05/16/2026)

The list of Volunteers in our in-game Special Thanks page will also be updated according to this list.
Please confirm if we have logged your name (The name you want us to credit you by) and contribution content correctly!
If there is any mistake, please let me know and we will fix it asap.


EN:
● omnichromia (Mercy) — Rewriting & Finalization (Wheels of Destiny)

RU: Riddle, Haps — Translation (Awakener Skills & Descriptions, UI Terms, Misc. Text)
Riddle, Haps, Chie, Ansu — Proofreading (Misc. Text)

KR:
● BlackCatNero — Translation (Main Story Act 2 Ch. 4, 5)
● LavenderJuly — Translation (PVP Voicelines, Tasks, User Interface)
(Some of the KR Translation are not showing up in game yet due to technical issues on our part. We sincerely apologize and will restore them ASAP)

JP:
● alz_asn (Alza) — Translation & Proofreading (Faded Legacy Ch. 8, Awakener Skills, Potency, and Talents)
● risend — Translation & Proofreading (Wheels of Destiny SR/SSR, Tasks, User Interface)

EN:
● omnichromia (Mercy) — Rewriting & Finalization (Wheels of Destiny)

RU: Riddle, Haps — Translation (Awakener Skills & Descriptions, UI Terms, Misc. Text)
Riddle, Haps, Chie, Ansu — Proofreading (Misc. Text)

KR:
● BlackCatNero — Translation (Main Story Act 2 Ch. 4, 5)
● LavenderJuly — Translation (PVP Voicelines, Tasks, User Interface)
(Some of the KR Translation are not showing up in game yet due to technical issues on our part. We sincerely apologize and will restore them ASAP)

JP:
● alz_asn (Alza) — Translation & Proofreading (Faded Legacy Ch. 8, Awakener Skills, Potency, and Talents)
● risend — Translation & Proofreading (Wheels of Destiny SR/SSR, Tasks, User Interface)

VN:
● Anicillia — Translation (Misc. Text, Awakener Skills & Descriptions, Awakener Name Localization)TH:
● darkerkuro — Translation (Items, Item Types)
● Shiraori — Proofreading (Items, Item Types)
Ohh I think darkerkuro and Shiraori is for another language isn’t it?
Could you please change the name display from “alz_asn(Alza)” to “Alza”?
